steps.title: Understand percent increase
steps.content: When mass increases by 624%, the new mass is the original mass plus 624% of the original mass. This means the new mass is (100% + 624%) = 724% of the original.

steps.title: Convert to decimal and solve
steps.content:
Convert 724% to a decimal multiplier: 724% = 7.24. Therefore, the new mass is:
$$\text{New mass} = 7.24k$$
That confirms A is correct.
